---
title: "🎥 Start a Byte (Screen Recording)"
description: "Start a Byte option allows you to record your screen in just a few clicks. It’s ideal for showing workflows, explaining a bug, or creating short tutorials for your teammates. Once you finish recording, your video is automatically saved in your library — ready to preview, annotate, or share."
navigation: true
authors:

### How to Use Start a Byte 

1. Open the quick capture bar

2. Click the recording option to begin setting up your screen capture.

3. Pick whether you want to record your entire screen, a specific window, or a selected tab.

4. Once you confirm, the recording will start immediately. Walk through your steps, show the issue, or explain your workflow.

5. When you're done, press the stop button to end the recording.

6. The recording is instantly added to your library as a Byte.

7. You can now preview it, add notes, annotate key moments, or share it with your team.


<template>
  <div class="border rounded-lg shadow-md mt-4 h-60">
    <iframe src="/quickstart-capture.png" class="rounded-lg w-full h-full" scrolling="no" frameborder="0"></iframe>

  </div>
</template>

### 💡 Tips

* Choose between full-screen or window recording. You can also include your voice or webcam for clearer communication.

* Use screen recording when a static image can’t explain a process clearly.

* Keep your Byte short (under 2 minutes) for easier sharing and feedback.

* Record only the window you need to keep the focus clean.

* After recording, check the preview before sharing to make sure everything is visible.
